title: ApplicationPool
description: A complete IIS application pool resource with all configuration settings for worker process isolation and management.

name.description: The name of the application pool.

id.description: The unique identifier of the application pool.

status.description: The current status of the application pool.

auto_start.description: Whether the application pool starts automatically when IIS starts.

pipeline_mode.description: The managed pipeline mode for the application pool.

managed_runtime_version.description: The version of the .NET CLR loaded by the application pool. Empty string for unmanaged code.

enable_32bit_win64.description: Whether to enable 32-bit applications on 64-bit Windows.

queue_length.description: The maximum number of requests that can be queued for the application pool before requests are rejected.
